content: Ticker/vsync: SingleTickerProviderStateMixin binds an AnimationController's Ticker to widget visibility so it auto-pauses when the route/widget is hidden, cutting CPU/battery waste from off-screen setState loops. Always dispose AnimationControllers in dispose() -- undisposed controllers leave Tickers running forever (memory leak + battery drain even after navigating away). Never do file IO, JSON parsing, or networking inside animation callbacks or build(); offload to isolates and profile with DevTools.
